name: Library Fetcher
description: OpenClaw book plugin with separate cache lookup, remote search, queued download, and login recovery flows backed by a persistent browser profile.

playbooksDir.label: Playbooks Dir
playbooksDir.help: Directory containing one playbook JSON per supported library site. Leave this set if you want siteId-based routing.

defaultSiteId.label: Default Site ID
defaultSiteId.help: Optional default site playbook id. For a single-site setup, prefer setting Default Playbook Path instead.

defaultPlaybookPath.label: Default Playbook Path
defaultPlaybookPath.help: Recommended for the bundled c-library provider. Points OpenClaw directly at the active site playbook.

defaultLibraryRoot.label: Library Root
defaultLibraryRoot.help: Local cache directory where downloaded books are stored. Keep this outside git-tracked content.

openclawMediaRoot.label: OpenClaw Media Root
openclawMediaRoot.help: Preferred outbound media root. Files mirrored here are always under OpenClaw's allowed local media directories.

browserProfilePath.label: Browser Profile Path
browserProfilePath.help: Persistent browser profile containing cookies and login state. Keep this directory and do not commit it.

agentBrowserSessionConfigPath.label: Session Config Path
agentBrowserSessionConfigPath.help: Recommended. JSON file containing the persistent sessionName/profilePath used by /bookfetch login and later headless runs.

downloadTimeoutMs.label: Download Timeout (ms)
downloadTimeoutMs.help: Optional timeout override for remote search and download steps. Keep this modest for debugging, raise it for large files.

remoteQueueConcurrency.label: Remote Queue Concurrency
remoteQueueConcurrency.help: Maximum number of concurrent remote library tasks. Keep this low to avoid site throttling.

remoteQueueMaxQueued.label: Remote Queue Max Queued
remoteQueueMaxQueued.help: Maximum number of waiting remote tasks before new requests are rejected.

agentBrowserPath.label: agent-browser Path
agentBrowserPath.help: Executable used only for login/session recovery. Leave as agent-browser if it is already on PATH.

llmFallbackCommand.label: LLM Repair Command
llmFallbackCommand.help: Optional external command that receives step failure context as JSON on stdin and returns repair instructions as JSON. Not needed for the normal path.

playbooksDir.description: Directory containing one playbook JSON per supported site.

defaultSiteId.description: Default site id resolved against playbooksDir.

openclawMediaRoot.description: OpenClaw local media root used for outbound attachments.

browserProfilePath.description: Optional browser profile path used for authenticated sessions.

agentBrowserSessionConfigPath.description: Optional JSON file used to resolve the persistent agent-browser session and profile.

remoteQueueConcurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent remote library tasks.

remoteQueueMaxQueued.description: Maximum number of waiting remote tasks before rejecting new ones.

agentBrowserPath.description: Optional absolute path to the agent-browser executable.

llmFallbackCommand.description: Optional external command used for LLM-based playbook repair.

llmFallbackArgs.description: Optional arguments passed to the LLM repair command.
